method.description: Patch operation to execute against meta or plus content.

domain.description: Target domain for the patch operation.

fqmn.description: Fully qualified metadata name of the target document when the patch addresses a single object.

patchedAt.description: Timestamp recorded for the patch request.

patchedBy.description: Human or agent identifier that initiated the patch.

doc.description: Document payload used by create, update, upsert, or refactor style operations.

query.description: Query used by by-query patch operations.

script.description: Script payload used for scripted patch operations.
